context: Tests whether the agent avoids unavailable iOS sheet-dismissal guidance and recommends current SwiftUI sheet routing and sizing patterns.

checklist.name: Does not claim iOS dismissalConfirmationDialog
checklist.description: Does not recommend dismissalConfirmationDialog as an iOS/iPadOS API for sheet dismissal confirmation.

checklist.name: Uses interactiveDismissDisabled
checklist.description: Uses interactiveDismissDisabled(_:) for iOS/iPadOS nonprogrammatic dismissal prevention when unsaved changes exist.

checklist.name: Requires explicit iOS actions
checklist.description: Requires explicit Save/Discard or confirmation UI inside the iOS/iPadOS sheet instead of relying on a missing system dismissal dialog.

checklist.name: Uses presentationSizing
checklist.description: Recommends presentationSizing(_:) values such as .form, .page, or .fitted instead of hard-coded sheet frames.

checklist.name: Prefers enum sheet routing
checklist.description: Prefers sheet(item:) with an Identifiable enum or similar model-backed routing over unrelated Boolean flags.
